creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
ok i think the reason for the "@@ -269,14 +271,14 @@" changes are the fact that
those lines were using CR+LF (Windows), instead of just LF (Unix). seems my
editor converted those automatically. so those lines should in fact be changed,
since we don't want extra CRs in text files.

cheers.
alex

-- 
a13x
